code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = io.read_line().ok_or("no input")?
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let score = string.parse_int(trimmed).ok_or("invalid int")?
  let grade = if score >= 90
    "A"
  else if score >= 75
    "B"
  else if score >= 60
    "C"
  else
    "F"
  end
  println(grade)
  Ok(())
end
